title: sec-review-team coverage record
description: Per-category coverage record: proves what the specialist checked and what limits its confidence. Emitted as one JSON object per line in <agent>.coverage.jsonl.

category.description: The attack-class / axis this record covers, e.g. 'prompt-injection', 'sql-injection', 'csp'.

status.description: checked-clean = category investigated, no findings; checked-issues-found = investigated, findings emitted; not-checked = category applicable but not investigated (capacity or scope cut); deferred-to-other-specialist = owned by another specialist in this run.

confidence.description: Confidence in the negative/clean finding. 'high' = thorough search, well-understood surface; 'low' = partial search or novel pattern.

searches.description: Exact grep/rg/find/command invocations run to prove the category is clean.

search_limits.description: One sentence on what these searches would miss (limits of the proof).

deferred_to.description: If status=deferred-to-other-specialist, which specialist owns this category in the current run.
